candidates.why: Direct reported total for current assets on the balance sheet; best match for ACT.
Section header, not a reported total line; weaker than the explicit total.

candidates.row_label: Working Capital excluding Other Current Assets & Liabilities
candidates.why: Derived metric, not total current assets.
Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over cash plus short-term investments.
Equivalent cash total line; acceptable fallback if label changes across years.
Includes short-term investments, broader than CHE.

variables.notes: Preferred pure cash-equivalents labels over broader cash plus short-term investments.

candidates.why: Direct reported total for current liabilities; best match for LCT.
Section header, not the reported total.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Best match to short-term debt/current portion of debt while excluding lease liabilities per rule.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Contains lease-related current debt via the paired including-capitalized-leases presentation; less preferred because baseline excludes leases.
Debt maturity disclosure that may overlap with current portion debt; weaker than explicit current portion excluding leases.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Selected a row outside the shortlist because it explicitly excludes capitalized leases and cleanly matches baseline STD.

candidates.why: Direct current taxes payable line on the balance sheet; best match for TXP.
Broader combined total, not limited to current taxes payable.
Deferred tax is not taxes payable.

variables.notes: Used the explicit current taxes payable label.

candidates.why: Direct total net PPE line; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Alternative net PPE line; acceptable fallback if total label varies.
Gross PPE, less preferred than net total when net is available.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total

candidates.why: Direct reported total assets line; best match for AT.
Only a component of assets, not total assets.
Asset component, not total assets.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.
Section header/method label, not the net cash flow amount.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the final net cash provided by operating activities line.
